# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented dynamic PR base-branch resolution for pr_open. ProcessPrToolPort now resolves refs/remotes/origin/HEAD, falls back to origin/main then origin/master, caches the resolved BaseBranchRef per port instance, and threads it through fetch, ancestry checks, commit log/diff ranges, soft reset, and gh pr create --base.
